scope.target: ENF-001 semantic governance enforcement, published-path disposition, and dedicated PR CI
constraints: Separate governance CI from package candidate ownership
No path removal without migration/downstream evidence
Consume REL validators without owning release mechanics

steps: Create and validate the v0.5 path-disposition artifact
Add governance PR workflow and path filters
Exercise foundation and REL validation commands
execution.last_completed_step: Implemented semantic thin-wrapper enforcement, the evidence-bound v2 published-path disposition contract, seven retain plus seven deprecate-in-place decisions, required aggregate gates, and a read-only governance pull-request workflow. Focused validator and fail-closed suites pass.
execution.next_action: Commit and push the ENF-001 core checkpoint, run the quick gate against the committed tree, then retain hosted governance and portable-gate evidence before closing the task.

results.summary: The implementation is complete locally; integrated committed-tree and hosted validation remain.
results.residual_risk: Hosted Ubuntu execution and the committed-tree aggregate quick gate remain before closure; macOS remains unverified.
